title: Centrifuge Repair - Centrifuge World: We Repair, Buy & Sell Industrial Centrifuges.
snippet: Homepage. Centrifuge World offers complete centrifuge repair, rebuilding and reconditioning for Oil, Chemical, Pharmaceuticals, Plastics, Food, Wine, Beer, Rendering, Wastewater and more. Repairs Sharples, Alfa Laval, Bird, Westfalia, Heinkel, Ketema, Tolhurst and others.

title: Custom Products & Services
snippet: Custom manufacturing of hard-to-find components; rents centrifuges, VFD panels, grinders, vertical dryers, tanks, drying shakers, and pumps; custom fabrication services.

title: Customer Service and Customer Support
snippet: Maintenance programs, onsite/field service engineers, troubleshooting, and 24/7 emergency support to keep equipment at peak efficiency.

title: About Centrifuge World
snippet: Company overview. Two service locations in Chicago, IL and Houston, TX; lead engineers formerly with Alfa Laval, Bird and Baker Perkins. Rebuild, repair and service centrifuges.

title: Centrifuge Inventory - Centrifuge World
snippet: Inventory landing page. Stock of decanter, vertical basket, pusher, peeler, disk stack separator, tubular, solid bowl and clarifier centrifuges for purchase, rental or exchange.

title: Centrifuge Parts Sales and Mfg. By Centrifuge.com
snippet: Parts sales and manufacturing. Extensive inventory of parts for current, older and obsolete machines; fabrication of new parts.

title: Dairy Centrifuge Repair Services - Landing Page - Centrifuge World
snippet: Repair and maintenance of dairy centrifuges, particularly Alfa Laval and Westfalia disc stack centrifuges.

title: Contact Centrifuge World
snippet: Contact page. Phone 1 (800) 208 6075; locations in Rosharon, TX and Franklin Park, IL; 24/7 emergency line.

title: Centrifuge World Media
snippet: Media / gallery page for Centrifuge World.

title: Centrifuge Rebuilding
snippet: Rebuilding services using Technologically Advanced Patented Processes (TAPP); rebuilds machines faster than OEMs for all types and brands.

title: Centrifuge Repair, Sales, and Rebuilding
snippet: Overview of services: rebuild and hard-surface conveyors, rebuild gearboxes and drive assemblies, dynamically balance bowl/conveyor/gearbox, test run, clean and repair frames.

title: Centrifuge Repair Services
snippet: Repair, rebuild, refurbishing and reconditioning services for all makes and models of industrial centrifuges.

title: Decanter Centrifuge Repair - Centrifuge.com
snippet: Repairs, rebuilds, fabricates and remanufactures decanter centrifuges of all makes, models and brands including Derrick, Humboldt, Hutchison Hayes, Dorr Oliver.

title: Gearbox Repair - Repair, Rebuild and Overhaul Services
snippet: Gearbox repair, rebuild and overhaul services; emergency repairs with 24 hour rush service on fabricated parts.

title: Centrifuge Parts
snippet: Repairs all working parts of any centrifuge; U12 Carbide Tiles; parts for Andritz, Flottweg, Bird, Krauss Maffei, Baker Perkins, Dorr Oliver, APV, Alfa Laval, Heinkel and more.

title: Pusher & Peeler Repair - Centrifuge World
snippet: Pusher and peeler centrifuge repair; rebuilding and hard surfacing conveyors, overhauling gearboxes and drive assemblies, dynamic balancing.

title: Disc Stack Separator Repair - Centrifuge World
snippet: Repair and reconditioning of disc stack separator centrifuges; recommends servicing every 8,000 operating hours or 12 months.

title: Basket Centrifuge Repair
snippet: Basket centrifuge repair; dynamically balancing the bowl, conveyor and gearbox assemblies.

title: Centrifuge Rentals
snippet: Rents centrifuges, VFD panels, grinders, vertical dryers, tanks, drying shakers and pumps; start-up commissioning, rig-up/down; technicians with TWIC/OSHA cards.

title: Centrifuge Inspection by Centrifuge World
snippet: Complimentary visual inspections and complete NDTI (Non-Destructive Testing and Inspection); comprehensive report with recommended services and parts.

title: Centrifuge Filtration Clarification Systems
snippet: Centrifuge technology paired with integral process tanks, transfer pumps, mounting platforms, piping, instruments, and control/automation.

title: Wastewater Treatment by Centrifuge.com
snippet: Manufactures automatic self-monitoring batch-sequence wastewater treatment systems for many industrial wastewater applications.

title: Sell Your Centrifuge | Centrifuge World | Call:1-800-208-6075
snippet: Buys all brands of industrial centrifuges for cash; trucks across USA and Canada. Buy/sell landing page.

title: We Buy & Sell Centrifuges / Sell Your Centrifuges & Basket Centrifuges
snippet: Buys and sells industrial centrifuges including basket, pusher & peeler and decanter types; new, used, refurbished.

title: Beer Centrifuges Beer Separators
snippet: Beer centrifuges and separators remove yeast and solids without stripping hop and malt flavors.
